title: Bushy Leaf Decay
description: Decaying leaves now have a different colour, making them recognizable from normal leaves.
body:
This texture pack is the continuation of [Visual Leaf Decay](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/visual-leaf-decay/) by [6_28318530717958](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/6_28318530717958/).

When leaves are decaying, it changes their color so they look dead.

The decaying variant of the leaves has different colours according to the tree, for example pale oak decaying leaves are almost white, whereas pretty much all the other leaves are orange.

The pack exists in two versions, one with bushy leaves for a more immersive experience.
